side_effects.description: Nausea and general unwell feeling seen in less than 1% of patients
Local irritation, redness, or discomfort at the site of injection

protocol_notes: OP is a practicing physician (self-described) who uses TA1 personally twice a year unless sick, and prescribes 30-60 day cycles of 500mcg daily to patients for general immune support. Uses 1.5mg daily for acute illness. Has used TA1 in patients pre- and post-surgery, and in autoimmune conditions including Ehlers-Danlos combined with GHK-cu.
